1504400003.english: That was the last one I just knocked down.

1504400005.korean:
왜 이곳에 혼자 온 거지?
단독 행동이 얼마나 위험한지 알고 있을 텐데?
1504400005.english: Why did you come here alone? You should know how risky going solo is.

1504400006.english: Sorry… I was too eager to check right away…

1504400008.korean: 네, 저 위치에 홀로그램으로 감춰진 보이지 않는 무언가가...
1504400008.english: Yes, there's something invisible hidden by a hologram at that spot…

1504400009.korean:
어? 갑자기 빛나잖아?
앗, 홀로그램이 꺼졌어요.
1504400009.english: Huh? It just lit up. Oh, the hologram's gone.

1504400011.korean:
거대한 기계 장치… 마치 가마처럼 보이는데 뭘까요?
위에 뭔가 초록색 액체가 든 병 같은 게 달려 있는데.
1504400011.english: A huge machine… looks like a cauldron. What's that? There's a bottle with green liquid on top.

1504400012.korean:
으앗? 갑자기 작동해요!
초록색 연기가 흘러나오는데…
1504400012.english: Whoa! It's suddenly activating! Green smoke is pouring out…

1504400013.korean:
…!! 페더, 물러서라!
절대 그 연기를 마시면 안 된다!!
1504400013.english: …!! Feather, get back! Don't ever breathe that smoke!!

1504400015.english: There's no doubt. This smoke is poison!

1504400016.english: Poison, you say!? What should we do?

1504400018.english: Ah, Admiral, watch out! Enemies behind!

1504400020.korean:
괜찮으세요?
연기 때문에 잘 안 보이는데 AGS 인가요?
1504400020.english: Are you okay? The smoke's making it hard to see— is that AGS?

1504400024.english: ...Feather, hurry and get out of here, back to the base.

1504400025.korean: 카라카스는 이제 곧, 전장이 될 거다.
1504400025.english: Caracas will soon be a battlefield.
